design_philosophy: Notion-inspired minimalism. The UI must get out of the way of the content. High reliance on typography, whitespace, and structural grayscale. Color is used strictly for function or state.

typography.font_install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports to index.css or load via Next.js/vite if applicable.

layout.spacing_system: Generous inside documents (p-8, p-12), tighter in dashboard grids (gap-4, gap-6).
layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Strict hierarchy.
layout.bento_spans: Summary metrics col-span-1. Main content col-span-2 or 3.
layout.containers: Flat. 1px border. max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). No drop shadows unless it's a floating menu/dialog.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-black/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors shadow-none
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 bg-transparent text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm

cards.default: border border-slate-200 bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-none

navigation.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 bg-[#F7F7F5] border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col p-4
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 flex items-center px-6 h-14

inputs.default: border border-slate-200 rounded-md bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/20 focus:border-slate-900 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-2 opacity-0 to translate-y-0 opacity-100) using framer-motion.

icons_and_media.emoji_usage: Encouraged for document icons, tags, and category headers (Notion style).

hero_study.description: Student wearing a hoodie writing notes at a wooden desk.

empty_state.description: People working at tables in a large room.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-slate-700 or darker for body.
accessibility.focus_rings: Visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/20) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not introduce generic blues or purples.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away heavy shadows. Use border-slate-200 and shadow-none.
For the dashboard, implement a Notion-like sidebar using the sidebar_background color.
Use emojis as icons for user-created documents or categories to reinforce the Notion vibe.
Ensure the layout is highly responsive. On mobile, the sidebar should become a hamburger menu or bottom sheet.
Implement the 'Active Study' mode using a clean, focus-mode interface (hide unnecessary nav, center content).
The Pricing page should feel premium yet minimal—monochrome tier cards with a subtle black solid button for the Premium tier.
